summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW webhook and email import features for Backup Monitoring app: Power Automate webhook endpoint, manual email import, Settings page with 4 tabs, webhook token management, and email parsing for multiple platforms (Proxmox, Synology, QNAP, Veeam). All new features working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Session timeout during extended testing causes redirect to login
design_issues.impact: Expected behavior - sessions expire after inactivity

passed_tests: Admin login works with credentials admin@backupmonitor.ro / Admin123!
Settings page loads correctly with all 4 required tabs
NEW: Power Automate tab displays webhook URL and token correctly
NEW: Webhook URL input shows correct endpoint: /api/webhook/power-automate
NEW: Webhook token input displays generated token (auto-generated on first access)
NEW: Copy buttons for webhook URL and token are present and functional
NEW: Regenerate token button works correctly
NEW: Folder path input shows 'Inbox/Backup Clienti' default value
NEW: Auto-match company toggle is present and functional
NEW: Default company selector dropdown works
NEW: Save webhook settings button is present
NEW: Webhook log section displays previous webhook calls
NEW: Power Automate configuration instructions are comprehensive
NEW: Import Email tab has company selector, subject input, body textarea
NEW: Preview and Import buttons are present and clickable
NEW: Parse preview card shows email parsing results
NEW: Office 365 tab has all required input fields (Client ID, Tenant ID, Secret, Email)
NEW: Office 365 save and test connection buttons are present
NEW: Platforme tab shows existing platforms and Add button
NEW: Add platform dialog opens and closes correctly
Backend API: GET /api/webhook/settings returns webhook config with auto-generated token
Backend API: POST /api/webhook/settings saves webhook configuration
Backend API: POST /api/webhook/regenerate-token generates new token
Backend API: GET /api/webhook/log returns webhook log entries
Backend API: POST /api/webhook/power-automate works with valid token (Proxmox email)
Backend API: POST /api/webhook/power-automate returns 401 with invalid token
Backend API: POST /api/backups/from-email creates backup from manual email (Synology)
Backend API: POST /api/parse-email-test parses Veeam email with 3 VM entries
Email parsing correctly detects platforms: Proxmox, Synology, Veeam
Webhook functionality creates backup entries and logs webhook calls
Manual email import workflow functional with preview capability
All existing features continue to work (companies, backups, users, etc.)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (29/29 tests passed including 5 new webhook/email tests)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all 4 Settings tabs functional, all UI elements present)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (webhook and email import features fully integrated)
